nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file for the Iceberg sink integration test, orchestrating Airflow (for DAG scheduling), Spark (for Iceberg table operations), MinIO (S3-compatible storage), and RisingWave with shared volume mounts.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Two-stage Dockerfile building custom Airflow (with Java 11 and iceberg-spark connectors) and Spark (with AWS S3 and Iceberg JAR dependencies) images for the Iceberg sink integration test.
nodes.languageNotes: Two named stages: airflow (apache/airflow:2.6.2-python3.10) and spark (bitnami/spark:3.3), each extended with additional JARs and packages.
